_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=synthetic mechanism witness for phase-lock-regeneration under a systemic shift; primary_source cites Levin 2021 + phase-conjugate memory (Soffer 1986). -->
primary_source: (Levin, 2021) DOI 10.3389/fnsys.2021.768201; (Soffer, 1986) DOI 10.1364/OL.11.000118. Amputated body plan A under a systemic shift phi=6 fools naive regeneration (-> plan 1) but phase-locked recall regenerates the true plan 0.
